about.zh: 热爱前端开发的工程师，拥有 5 年以上 Web 开发经验。专注于构建高性能、可维护的用户界面，熟悉现代前端技术栈，具备良好的团队协作能力和问题解决能力。
about.en: Passionate frontend developer with 5+ years of web development experience. Focused on building high-performance, maintainable user interfaces with modern frontend tech stacks.

experience.company: 某科技有限公司 / Tech Co., Ltd.
experience.role: 高级前端工程师 / Senior Frontend Developer
points: 主导公司核心产品前端架构重构，将页面加载速度提升 40%
带领 3 人前端小组，推动组件库建设，复用率提升至 70%
与产品、设计、后端紧密协作，按时交付多个重点项目
Led frontend architecture refactor of core product, improving load speed by 40%
Managed a 3-person frontend team, built component library with 70% reuse rate

experience.company: 某互联网公司 / Internet Company
experience.role: 前端开发工程师 / Frontend Developer
points: 参与多个 B 端管理系统开发，使用 Vue 2/3 + Element UI
负责移动端 H5 页面开发，适配主流机型
Developed multiple B2B management systems using Vue 2/3 + Element UI
Built mobile H5 pages with cross-device compatibility

projects.name: 企业数据可视化平台
projects.desc: 负责前端整体架构设计与开发，实现多维度数据图表展示、实时数据推送及权限管理模块。
projects.descEn: Led frontend architecture design and development, implementing multi-dimensional data charts, real-time data push, and permission management modules.

projects.name: 移动端电商 H5
projects.desc: 独立开发移动端电商页面，包含商品列表、购物车、订单流程等核心功能，日活用户超 10 万。
projects.descEn: Independently developed mobile e-commerce pages including product listing, cart, and order flow. Reached 100k+ daily active users.

projects.name: 低代码表单引擎
projects.desc: 设计并实现基于 JSON Schema 的动态表单引擎，支持拖拽配置，减少重复开发工作量约 60%。
projects.descEn: Designed and implemented a JSON Schema-based dynamic form engine with drag-and-drop configuration, reducing repetitive development by ~60%.

education.degree: 计算机科学与技术 学士 / B.S. in Computer Science
